## Skill submission: <!-- skill name -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Under 500 words
- [ ] Has all required sections (`name`, `description`, `## When to use`, `## What to do`, `## Never`)
- [ ] No internal or org-specific references
- [ ] No hardcoded model names
- [ ] Tested locally — triggers correctly in Claude Code
- [ ] `## When to use` contains exact phrases a dev would say
- [ ] `## Never` contains hard rules, not suggestions

### Description

<!-- What does this skill do? When should someone install it? -->
